member.name: T:_208_Group_Project_Demo.Blackjack
member.summary: Represents a game of blackjack, managing the card shoe, player and dealer hands, and game logic.

member.name: M:_208_Group_Project_Demo.Blackjack.DealCards(System.Collections.Generic.List{_208_Group_Project_Demo.Card},System.Int32)
member.summary: Deals n cards to either the player or the dealer, specified with toPlayer
member.param: The number of cards to deal
The hand the cards are dealt to
member.returns: The hand with cards dealt to it

member.name: M:_208_Group_Project_Demo.Blackjack.PlayBlackjack
member.summary: Plays a complete game of blackjack between the player and the dealer, handling all game logic and user interaction.
member.returns: A BlackjackResult indicating the outcome of the game.

member.name: M:_208_Group_Project_Demo.Blackjack.StartBlackjack
member.summary: Initializes and starts a new game of blackjack, dealing cards to the player and dealer and updating the game state.

member.name: M:_208_Group_Project_Demo.Blackjack.PlayerTurn(_208_Group_Project_Demo.BlackjackAction)
member.summary: Processes the player's action during their turn in a game of Blackjack.
member.param: The action chosen by the player, such as Hit or Stand.

member.name: M:_208_Group_Project_Demo.Blackjack.DealerTurn
member.summary: Executes the dealer's turn in the Blackjack game, updating the dealer's hand and game state according to standard rules.

member.name: M:_208_Group_Project_Demo.Blackjack.EndGame
member.summary: Ends the current blackjack game, determines the outcome based on player and dealer hands, and outputs the result.
member.returns: A BlackjackResult value indicating the outcome of the game.

member.name: M:_208_Group_Project_Demo.Blackjack.HandValue(System.Collections.Generic.List{_208_Group_Project_Demo.Card})
member.summary: Calculates the total value of a hand of cards, treating aces as 1 or 11 to maximize the hand's value without exceeding 21.
member.param: The list of cards whose value is to be calculated.
member.returns: The total value of the hand.

member.name: M:_208_Group_Project_Demo.Blackjack.HandToString(System.Collections.Generic.List{_208_Group_Project_Demo.Card})
member.summary: Returns a comma-separated string of card IDs from the given hand.
member.param: The list of Card objects representing the hand.
member.returns: A string containing the IDs of the cards in the hand, separated by commas.

member.name: T:_208_Group_Project_Demo.CardCounter
member.summary: Calculates counts according to a HiLo card counting system

member.name: M:_208_Group_Project_Demo.CardCounter.GetRunningCount
member.summary: Calculates and returns the current running count based on the cards dealt to the player and dealer, resetting the count if the card shoe has been refilled.
member.returns: The current running count after processing new cards.

member.name: M:_208_Group_Project_Demo.CardCounter.GetTrueCount
member.summary: Calculates and returns the true count by dividing the running count by the number of decks remaining in the shoe.
member.returns: The current true count as an integer.

member.name: M:_208_Group_Project_Demo.CardCounter.CountCard(_208_Group_Project_Demo.Card)
member.summary: Adjusts the running count based on the rank of the specified card using predefined rank groups.
member.param: The card whose rank is evaluated to update the running count.
